docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING IN PART AND DENYING IN PART DEFENDANT'S EX PARTE APPLICATION RE: ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100036510), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARNUM, SAMUEL SERVED APR-24-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE APR-26-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT HERRERA, RICARDO
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR NOV-19-2018. THE SEP-19-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANTS EX PART APPLICATION TO MOVE THE ARBITRATION OF MARCH 1, 2019, AND EXTEND THE JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR (TRANSACTION ID # 63013879) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARNUM, SAMUEL
ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO MAR-29-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-03-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT RICARDO HERRERA, AMERICAN MEDICAL RESPONSE INC.'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS. OFF CALENDAR. ON MAY 17, 2019, DEFENDANTS REJECTED THE ARBITRATOR'S AWARD AND FILED A REQUEST FOR TRIAL. AS A RESULT, NO JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED ON THE AWARD OR ON PLAINTIFF'S PREMATURE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS. (SEE CAL. R. CT. 3.827(A)(1) ["THE CLERK MUST ENTER THE AWARD AS A JUDGMENT IMMEDIATELY UPON THE EXPIRATION OF 60 DAYS AFTER THE AWARD IS FILED IF NO PARTY HAS, DURING THAT PERIOD, SERVED AND FILED . . . A REQUEST FOR TRIAL AS PROVIDED IN THESE RULES."].) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-20-2019 Vacated

Defendant Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Jun-03-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RICARDO HERRERA, AMERICAN MEDICAL RESPONSE INC.'s Motion To Tax Costs.

Off calendar. On May 17, 2019, Defendants rejected the arbitrator's award and filed a request for trial. As a result, no judgment will be entered on the award or on Plaintiff's premature memorandum of costs. (See Cal. R. Ct. 3.827(a)(1) ["The clerk must enter the award as a judgment immediately upon the expiration of 60 days after the award is filed if no party has, during that period, served and filed . . . A request for trial as provided in these rules."].)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

TDN SWEEP
Off Calendar Jun-17-2019 Set For Trial On Oct-15-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
